Klasse AAppc

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.test.ASyxTestCase
de.btu.kt.syx.util.AAppc
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
ILogger
public abstract class AAppc extends ASyxTestCase
Base class of console-based apps.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff, BTU Cottbus-Senftenberg

  • Verschachtelte Klassen - Übersicht

    Verschachtelte Klassen
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    class 
    AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException
    Thrown by command handlers if they do not accept the UI command.
    class 
    AAppc.ErrorReport
    An error report containing an error counter and a list of error messages.

    getLogID, getMidiInterfaceName, getProperty

    • getVerbose

      public int getVerbose()
      Returns the verbose level of this app's message and
      Ungültige Referenz 
      error
      loggers.
      Angegeben von:
      getVerbose in Schnittstelle ILogger
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      getVerbose in Klasse ASyxTestCase

    • setVerbose

      public void setVerbose(int verbose)
      Sets the verbose level of this app's message and
      Ungültige Referenz 
      error
      loggers.
      Parameter:
      verbose - the verbose level

    • onCmdXListMidiInterfaces

      public boolean onCmdXListMidiInterfaces(String command) throws AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException
      UI command handler – List available MIDI interfaces.
      Parameter:
      command - The UI command
      Gibt zurück:
      true
      Löst aus:
      AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException - if command is not "m"

    • onCmdZzHelp

      public final boolean onCmdZzHelp(String command) throws AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException
      UI command handler – Print help.
      Parameter:
      command - The UI command
      Gibt zurück:
      true
      Löst aus:
      AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException - if command is not "?"

    • onCmdZaVerbose

      public final boolean onCmdZaVerbose(String command) throws AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException
      Löst aus:
      AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException

    • onCmdZzQuit

      public final boolean onCmdZzQuit(String command) throws AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException
      UI command handler – Quit the app.
      Parameter:
      command - The UI command
      Gibt zurück:
      false
      Löst aus:
      AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException - if command is not "q"

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      A minimal demo app. Provides a hello world command "hello" as an example, and a command "mi" which lists all available MIDI interfaces.
      Parameter:
      args - The command line arguments
